statusLine.command: bash "$(case "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" in /mnt/*) printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR";; *) wslpath -u "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR";; esac)/.claude/hooks/statusline.sh"
